imageUrls: if not exist storage\exports mkdir storage\exports

powershell -NoProfile -Command "$u=(Get-Clipboard).Trim(); $obj=@{status='OK'; decision='adapter_001_image_url_saved'; product_key='adapter_001'; imageUrls=@($u)} | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5; Set-Content -Path 'storage\exports\adapter_001_image_urls_v1.json' -Value $obj -Encoding UTF8"
